description: The CheckerboardCubemap component procedurally generates a cubemap for Projection 360 Materials that is a checkerboard with different pairs of colors for each of the 6 sides.

fields.Size: The size of each side of the cubemap in pixels.
fields.CheckerSize: The size in pixels for 1 square of the checkerboard pattern.

usage: Put into the ``CubeMap`` field of a Projection 360 Materials to view what the skybox would look like.
